text:
依頼、ありがとね。
助かったよ。

出来たかな？
うん。いい出来、いい出来。
ありがとね。

おっつかれさまー！
ありがとね、助かったよ！

Thank you for fulfilling the order.
You've been very helpful.

Did you get it done?
Ah, very nice. Very nice.
Thank you.

Great job!
Thank you, you've been a great help!

おっ、これが頼んだやつ？
予想以上の出来だね。
助かったよ、ありがとねっ。

すごーい！
いやあ、見事な品だねー！
次もよろしくね！

文句なしの出来だよ！
頼んだ甲斐があったよー！
またよろしくね！

Ah, so this is the thing I requested?
You did a better job than I thought you would.
Thanks a lot for your help.

Amazing!
Wow, this is quite something!
Looking forward to having you help again!

An unimpeachable effort!
Getting you on the job was a good decision.
See you around!
